bug.description: missing NULL check after memory allocation that can fail

prompt:
There is a missing NULL check after memory allocation that can fail downstream of function nrf_egu_int_enable in the targets/TARGET_NORDIC/TARGET_NRF5x subsystem.
The function is located at targets/TARGET_NORDIC/TARGET_NRF5x/TARGET_SDK_15_0/modules/nrfx/hal/nrf_egu.h:356.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
